Title: Implement GOAP fallback in HtnPlanner.ReplanAsync
Description:
Currently ReplanAsync does a full restart of the failed goal. Phase 4 should add GOAP (Goal-Oriented Action Planning) to handle specific phase failures.

Example: GatherWood phase 'MineWood' fails because 'no oak_log in reach'. GOAP backward-chains from the goal state and finds an alternative path (e.g. FindDifferentTree, MoveToNewArea).

Design:
1. Define GoapAction record (Name, Preconditions: Dict<string,object>, Effects: Dict<string,object>, Cost: double)
2. Implement GoapPlanner.Plan(goal: WorldState, current: WorldState, actions: IReadOnlyList<GoapAction>) -> IReadOnlyList<GoapAction>
3. In HtnPlanner.ReplanAsync: if the failed phase has a GOAP action set, run GOAP with current WorldState
4. Convert GOAP result to ActionData sequence

This is Phase 4 Priority 3 -- implement after adaptive execution and spatial analyzer.
